general_goal_of_analysis: Describe and advocate for Universal Basic Income policy, tracing Brazil's pioneering legislation and highlighting positive experiences in Kenya and Maricá (RJ)
brief_justification: The article is an essayistic, advocacy-oriented piece describing the history and evolution of Universal Basic Income legislation in Brazil and positive experiences in Kenya and Maricá (RJ). It contains no tables, figures, equations, or quantitative analysis. It is primarily normative and descriptive, arguing in favor of UBI adoption, and does not employ any systematic empirical research design.
